achievements.title: Retro Gaming
achievements.description: [Arcade] Win a Deathmatch on Chinese with the following settings: 8-bit cheat: On, Score Limit: 50+, Handicaps: Off, Character Abilites: On, Weapon Set: Retro and Bot Set: Recommended with all bots on
achievements.author: Goodbite

achievements.title: Team? Deathmatch
achievements.description: [Arcade] Win a Team Deathmatch with the following settings: Score Limit: 20+, Method: Kills - Losses, Time Limit: None, FF Damage: On, Weapon+Bot Set: Recommended with all bots on
achievements.author: Goodbite

achievements.title: Intense Training
achievements.description: [Arcade] Win a Capture the Bag match on Training Ground with the following settings: All Characters Cloaked cheat: On, Handicaps: Off, Character Abilities: On, Weapon+Bot Set: Recommended with all bots on - top 5 bots red team, bottom 5 blue
achievements.author: Goodbite

achievements.title: Baggage Claim

achievements.author: Goodbite

achievements.title: Extended Reality

achievements.title: Guerilla Warfare
